result:
The security audit is complete. Here's the summary.

## Harden — Security Audit Complete ✅

**Entry point:** `./` · **Outcome:** `pr` · **PR:** https://github.com/thabungm/testHubLaunch/pull/94

### What was scanned
This repo ships Bash tooling (`.github/scripts/*.sh`, the 3,345-line `ralph-run.sh`) and skill Markdown. No JS/Python/Go dependency manifests exist, so `npm/pnpm audit` is **N/A** (documented in the report).

### Findings & fixes

| Severity | Issue | Location | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Medium | Insecure temp file — predictable path in world-writable `/tmp` (CWE-377 / CWE-59, symlink following) | `hula-verify-gather.sh:116` | **Fixed** |
| Medium | Insecure temp file — predictable path in world-writable `/tmp` (CWE-377 / CWE-59, symlink following) | `hula-verify-post.sh:63` | **Fixed** |

Both scripts wrote to fixed names (`/tmp/hula-verify-diff-<pr>.patch`, `/tmp/hula-verify-comment-<pr>.md`). A local attacker pre-creating a symlink there could hijack the `>` redirect to clobber a runner-writable file or feed tampered diff content downstream. Both now use `mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/…-XXXXXX.<ext>"` with a `|| die` guard, matching the pattern already used in `ralph-run.sh`.

### Reviewed, clean
- **No hardcoded secrets** (scanned AWS/OpenAI/GitHub/Slack/private-key patterns).
- **No injection sinks** — arg parsers quote variables, JSON-escape embedded values, reject path traversal, and pass user input to `gh`/`git` as positional args (no shell `eval`).
- `ralph-run.sh` already strips tokens from remote URLs and keeps `GITHUB_TOKEN` out of on-disk config.

### Verification
- `bash -n` passes on all 8 scripts + `ralph-run.sh`.
- Both `mktemp` templates create files successfully in a live test.
- No introduced regressions; no new critical findings.

Lessons file updated at `.hublaunch/lessons/harden-scan-202607030941_RALPH_LESSONS.md`. The "3 uncommitted changes" warning during PR creation is only the excluded `.hublaunch/{jobs,lessons,logs}` runtime artifacts — the PR contains exactly the two script fixes.
